title: Update Spider-Verse comic panel assets for Miles depiction and fight-scene illustrations

requirements.summary: Update existing comic panel illustration assets so Miles Morales is visually depicted as Black in all panels where he appears (including partial/shadow visibility) while preserving filenames and composition.
acceptanceCriteria: All relevant story panel images in `frontend/public/assets/generated/` depict Miles Morales as a Black character (e.g., facial features/skin tone/hair), consistent with the Spider-Verse comic style.
No image filenames referenced by the app change (the app continues to load the same `/assets/generated/spiderverse-panel-*.dim_1024x768.png` paths).

file_operations.description: Replace the existing image content so Miles is clearly depicted as Black while preserving the current scene composition and the exact filename/path.
Replace the existing image content so Miles is clearly depicted as Black (even if partially visible) while preserving the dramatic ceiling-stuck composition and the exact filename/path.
Replace the existing image content so Miles is depicted as Black even in shadow/low light while preserving the scene framing and the exact filename/path.
Replace the existing image content so Miles is clearly depicted as Black during the reveal scene while preserving composition and the exact filename/path.
Replace the existing image content so Miles is clearly depicted as Black in the determined pose panel while preserving backlighting/composition and the exact filename/path.
Replace the existing image content so Miles is clearly depicted as Black in the leap panel while preserving vertigo perspective/composition and the exact filename/path.
Replace the existing image content so Miles is clearly depicted as Black in the swinging panel while preserving neon/composition and the exact filename/path.

requirements.summary: Update existing fight/action illustration assets so action scenes render as dynamic comic-style panels (not blank/placeholder) while keeping viewer layout unchanged.
acceptanceCriteria: Fight/action panels render an illustration (not missing) and the visuals clearly appear as comic art (inked outlines, stylized shading, comic motion/impact language).
Fight/action panels remain viewable in the Comic Viewer without layout breakage (image fits within the panel frame and scroll area as before).

file_operations.description: Replace the existing fight-scene image content with a clearly comic-style, dynamic action composition (inked outlines, motion/impact cues) while preserving the exact filename/path and dimensions.

Replace the existing final battle image content with a clearly comic-style, dynamic action composition while preserving the exact filename/path and ensuring it still fits the existing Comic Viewer layout.
Replace the existing venom blast/action moment image content with a clearly comic-style, dynamic action composition while preserving the exact filename/path and dimensions.

requirements.summary: Revise `illustrationAlt` strings in `frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts` for the updated Miles panels and fight/action panels to accurately describe the new visuals in English.
acceptanceCriteria: `illustrationAlt` entries for updated panels describe the visible scene accurately and remain in English.
No TypeScript errors are introduced in `frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts`.

file_operations.description: Update `illustrationAlt` for panels referencing spiderverse-panel-02, -05, -07, -10, -14, -16, -17, -18, -19, and -20 so the text explicitly matches the updated visuals (including Miles depicted as Black and the fight/action scenes reading as comic panels), keeping strings clear, accurate, and English-only.
